description: Data loaded from CSV file: 16.csv (Dataset: Pokemon with stats)

fields.name: id
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the unique identifier assigned to each Pokémon species in the official Pokédex, indicating their sequential order in the Pokémon franchise.

fields.name: Name
fields.sample_values: Abomasnow, AbomasnowMega Abomasnow, Abra, Absol, AbsolMega Absol, ..., Zoroark, Zorua, Zubat, Zweilous, Zygarde50% Forme
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the official names and variant forms (such as Mega evolutions and alternate formes) of individual Pokémon species, serving as unique identifiers within the Pokémon franchise and game data.

fields.name: Type 1
fields.sample_values: Bug, Dark, Dragon, Electric, Fairy, ..., Poison, Psychic, Rock, Steel, Water
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: "Type 1" indicates the primary elemental or thematic category assigned to each Pokémon, reflecting its main abilities and strengths within the Pokémon game universe (e.g., Electric, Water, Steel).

fields.name: Type 2
fields.sample_values: Fairy, Steel, Flying, nan, Dragon, ..., Grass, Water, Dark, Fighting, Ground
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the secondary elemental type assigned to each Pokémon, indicating their additional combat attributes in the Pokémon game universe; if null, the Pokémon has only a single type.

fields.name: Total
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the sum of all base stats for each Pokémon, indicating its overall strength or capability in the context of Pokémon games.

fields.name: HP
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: HP represents the "Hit Points" or health of each Pokémon, quantifying how much damage it can sustain before fainting in the context of Pokémon battles.

fields.name: Attack
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The "Attack" field represents the numerical value of a Pokémon's offensive strength, indicating how much damage it can inflict in battles within the Pokémon game or universe.

fields.name: Defense
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The "Defense" field quantifies a Pokémon's ability to withstand physical attacks, representing its defensive strength within the Pokémon game mechanics.

fields.name: Sp. Atk
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the numerical value of a Pokémon's Special Attack stat, indicating its ability to inflict damage with special moves in Pokémon battles.

fields.name: Sp. Def
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: "Sp. Def" represents a Pokémon's Special Defense stat, indicating its ability to resist damage from special attacks, measured as an integer value within the game's battle mechanics.

fields.name: Speed
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The "Speed" field represents each Pokemon's numerical speed stat, indicating how quickly a Pokemon can act in battle compared to others in the game.

fields.name: Generation
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates which release cycle or era a Pokémon was introduced in, corresponding to one of the six official generations of the Pokémon franchise.

fields.name: Legendary
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates whether a Pokémon is classified as a "Legendary" Pokémon (True) or not (False) based on official Pokémon franchise definitions.

formatted_summary:
## Table 1: Pokemon_with_stats (800 rows × 13 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 16.csv (Dataset: Pokemon with stats)

### Schema (13 fields)
  - id -- type: int64, values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, ..., 717, 718, 719, 720, 721
  - Name -- type: object, values: Abomasnow, AbomasnowMega Abomasnow, Abra, Absol, AbsolMega Absol, ..., Zoroark, Zorua, Zubat, Zweilous, Zygarde50% Forme
  - Type 1 -- type: object, values: Bug, Dark, Dragon, Electric, Fairy, ..., Poison, Psychic, Rock, Steel, Water
  - Type 2 -- type: object, values: Fairy, Steel, Flying, nan, Dragon, ..., Grass, Water, Dark, Fighting, Ground
  - Total -- type: int64, values: 180, 190, 194, 195, 198, ..., 680, 700, 720, 770, 780
  - HP -- type: int64, values: 1, 10, 20, 25, 28, ..., 165, 170, 190, 250, 255
  - Attack -- type: int64, values: 5, 10, 15, 20, 22, ..., 165, 170, 180, 185, 190
  - Defense -- type: int64, values: 5, 10, 15, 20, 23, ..., 168, 180, 184, 200, 230
  - Sp. Atk -- type: int64, values: 10, 15, 20, 23, 24, ..., 165, 170, 175, 180, 194
  - Sp. Def -- type: int64, values: 20, 23, 25, 30, 31, ..., 150, 154, 160, 200, 230
  - Speed -- type: int64, values: 5, 10, 15, 20, 22, ..., 140, 145, 150, 160, 180
  - Generation -- type: int64, values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
  - Legendary -- type: bool, values: False, True

### Sample Data (first 5 rows)
```

2   3               Venusaur  Grass  Poison    525  80      82       83      100      100     80           1      False
3   3  VenusaurMega Venusaur  Grass  Poison    625  80     100      123      122      120     80           1      False
4   4             Charmander   Fire     NaN    309  39      52       43       60       50     65           1      False
```
